title: camissonia angelorum
intro: Camissonia angelorum, also known as Angel's Cup, is a rare and endangered desert wildflower that belongs to the evening primrose family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Camissonia angelorum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
